headline: Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) Expands Zepbound Access as Pricing Reforms Boost Long-Term Growth Outlook
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) is one of the best forever stocks to buy now. On March 16, Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) announced that its weight-loss drug Zepbound will be available for self-pay starting at $299 per month for the 2.5 mg dose through LillyDirect and major pharmacies, expanding access for patients without insurance. […]
